creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244212
Patch for json-c

* Clean up Makefile to follow Porters Handbook more closely
* Use cmake:testing helper
* pathfix to USES=
* Remove redundant CMake arguments

Compile and runtime tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)

Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in 12.4-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
audio/owntone
audio/pianobar
audio/pianod2
